TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pahakelong han i likisi ko kawasan ni Wufong == Pipalasawad to fodawan faco ni Wufong Pitedalan no Taywan i 1987 mihecaan i, "Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof" palowad to kinapinapina piliyang a demak, nai saka 1 folad, itira i Huaxicie no Taipisi mipa'orip to tasalamaan fafahiyan pirarakat, miliyang to pi'ot'ot to tadem no Bunun ko sifo no Nanto, tereken ko tamdaw i kowang: mipa'orip to kapah no Cozoku finacadan ci Tang Yingshen, mo'ecela rakat: mipeleng to kawasan ni Wufong micikeroh patikoen ko sera ako sanay a onto, i 1987 miheca o katapi'elalan no yincumin a onto koya mihecaan itiya. Awaayko sapipatirengan to fiw no Cozoku a tamdaw, mangalef o pipatireng to fiw ni Wufong, paretatenga ko yincumin to kimad ni Wufong, saheto nai Mancin a ni lengatan, talacowa o Dipong to ano eca Komintang to, saheto o misamangahay pisanga' no mikowanay a kawasan kimad, milongoc cangra to pipalasawad to tilid i sifana' to "mikinafalahay to tireng a tamdaw ci Wufong", mimangahan a demak a sifana' a tilid. Palowad to masacalayay dadoedo miliyang to kawasan kimad ni Wufong ko Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof, halo 1987 miheca 9 folad 9 romi'ad (kasofocan ni Wufong), toya romi'ad itira i ka'ayaw no siataw no Ciayi cilamalay mipapelo ato mirarakat, miteleng cangra to "maanen aca, Wufong, caayko tadamaanay kiso", "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong" sanay a tilid miliyang, pasayra mitekoll to fitaol i fodawan ni Wufong, herek no lahok tayra i Ciayi siencenfo pafeli to saliyang a tilid. 1987 miheca 9 folad 12 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, o kapah no yincumin micayat to tilid "O niyaro' no Cozoko caay ko ni Wufong a niyaro'" sanay, nai Taywan daykako romakat pasi kiwikopo, patorod to piliyang a tilid ci Mao Gaowen citidongay, milongoc palasawad to tilid i hong no kaemangay to kawasan ni Wufong salongoc. Paretatenga ko yincumin to pipalakawas ci Wufongan, caay ko mikinafalahay to tireng tadamaanay tamdaw ci Wufong. Nikawrira oni miliyangay palakawasay kimad ni Wufong a onto, ikor no cecay miheca i, citodongay a Komitang caay pikihar to piliyang no sakapot no yincumin, o citodongay kiwikopo awaay ko temitemik. Lin Zhefu hakasi a pikonlingan URM, nawhani ano tayra miraayay i Canada ko pinanam malaom ko payso. Ona tayraay to i Amilika, Canada, Dipong ci Lin Zongzheng itiya, milayap to saka 4 liyad URM cecayay folad a pikonling. Paherek minanam minokay tayni Taywan ci Lin Zongzheng i, malakakeridan to no URM i Taywan saka, pasifana' to caay ko nifolawan ko piliyang sanay a sifana'. Pitiposan no 1988 mihecaan itiya, itini to i Taywan ko pinanaman, itini Taynan Koupei kiwkay saka 9 lekad pinanam to URM, sahato o yincumin ko mikihatiyaay itiya, ci Lin Zongzheng ko citodongay kakeridan, saikoray romi'ad to dadaya sa'opo, masasowasowal cangra to pakayniay "kawasan ni Wufong", oya minanamay paretatenga "mikinafalahay to tireng" a Wufong o mangahay kawasan saan, mitelek sapidipotaw to sakatari'ang no yincumin, pelengaw ita ko fodawan faco ni Wufong i ka'ayaw siataw no cinamalay i Ciayi sato, malo "paherekan no pinanam" tonini liyad saan cangra. Saikoray romi'ad no 1988 miheca itiya, o pipaikr no yincumin to hatiniay lafin to pilokes pisamsam a lisin koni. I 12 folad 31 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, "sakapot milefekay to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a yincumin, halo ci Pasuya Tiakiana Cozoku tamdaw, Masao Nikar 'Amis a tamdaw, Kavas Takistaulan, aci Tiang Qulmutan, Bunun tamdaw, Danav Pakikeli, Ripun, Ngedrel, Chen Xiongshu aci DremdremanTjausunug Paiwan tamdaw, Tuau Yugehai, Laysa Akyo aci Yukuy Watan Tayal tamdaw, Lin Zongzheng, Huang Zhaokai, Dai Zhenyao, Liu Fengsong, Zhan Yihua, Chen Wenzhi, Zeng Junren, Pan Jianer, Huang Lingna 30 ko tamdaw itiya. Onini a lalowadan ci Lin Zongzheng ko misa'osiay to "pipeleng mitaroh to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a ratoh no demak, saka o kapolong nipanganganan no yincumin a pihapiw. Lalowadan a demak no pihapiw matiniay: "1. Onini a demak o nano nilonokan no finawlan a yincumin, polong no kasakapot ato finawlan o palaheci to naifaloco'an no yincumin, o padama to sapilaheciaw a demak no yincumin a sacoker, miahowid kami tonini. 2. Caay ko "sa'opo" a todong koni, o pipeleng to milokesay to yincumin a kawasan demak, caay pirakarak no niyam koni, o sapitadoaw mitefad to fodawan a nipatorodan no Caiyisi sifo i patefaday a Secehuy. 3. Oya misolap mitena'ay a citodongay, pateked to syakay ato sarikec kami. 4. Ikor no Secehuy a misafa'eloh to roma a fodawan, mangalay kami mikilim to payso ano eca matayalay tonini. Mato manga'ay mapatireng ko "piharatengan pitiw no 228", o nipafaloco'an no finawlan no Tawan ko nian." "Sakapot milefekay to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a yincumin, mipatala to sakadademak to marar a rosaros, marar a kadang, waya toaso, tosaay paliding…, misi'ayaw haca to imeng mipalo to sakapot, mikalic i fafaed, pakafit to waya a toaso i tatirengan ni Wufong ko mitiliday no Yisan sinkakoyin ci Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli itiya, kiraromot han to no imeng i sasera itiya, madoka' milafin i isingan cangra. Nai pipelengan to fodawan faco ni Wufong a pisahalaka tangasa teked a pidemak, o mo'etepay aca ko romi'adan. Saka laheci sa i herek no lahok to cecay ko toki itiya, no kikian saka polin no fodawan faco ni Wufong, mahaenay a demakan, o pisacakocakod ni Lin Zongzheng micala' to "Haliloya, Haliloya." Sanay, oya sakapot ala taketakec sato malipahak mapolong. Kalekapot mitaroh ko kapah no yincumin, masongila' mapeleng koya fodawan faco ni Wufong ka'ayaw no cilamalay i siataw no Ciayi, caay ko rahodayay demaken koni, oya saka 9 liyad a URM sakapot nidemakan ko kalaheci, oya tadamaanay tayal no URM han aca. Marepet no imeng ko tatoloay ca Lin Zongzheng, Zeng Junren aci Pan Jianer, marofo to cecay lipay, ikor ala 10 'ofad payso ko sapipasadak cangraan, oya pasadakay to payso o ising no mata a Taynansi ci Zheng Shenghui ko tayra sanay i pirofoan i Caiyi pasadak to tamdaw. O paki likisiay ato sini'adaay a pisetek koni, oya miliclicay o nano pingkosi no Militaw ci Lin Qingang fingkosi itiya, nawhani matiniay kalalitemoh, mapamo'ecel aca ko nia fodawan faco ni Wufong. Ikor to no tosa folad, kinacecay ni Lin Qingang miliclic misetek toya tatoloay tamdaw a palasawad to raraw, oya mikinsaay caay to pacakat tonini a demak, nanoyaan sa malaheci itiya. Ikor no pipalasawad to fodawan faco ni Wufong, mipaca'of to ko Komintang itiya: nai 1989 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad, laloma'an citodongay (Nicenpo) oya Wufongsiang falicen pala Alisansiang; 9 folad 12 roi'ad, Koli nikawitay palasawaden nai pitilidan ko pakayniay kimad ni Wufong i hong, saka oya "mikinafalahay to tireng" sanay a kawasan nanoyaan sato malasawad, mapatiyol to ko katari'ang no yincumin. Yincuminco wiyinhuy nai 1998 miheca 11 folad 6 romi'ad, misetek mihapiw o nao "Tsao finacadan" mafalic pala "Cozo finacadan" sato. Picaliwan a tilid, nai Lise to'ek. Cifaloco'ay no timol nilicayan ci Huang Zhaokai, milicayay ci Zheng Peiwen, 2018 Taynan sisifo ponkaci mirina'ay. Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar.
S.PHON: == paħakəɾo~uŋ ħan i ɾikisi ko~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ == pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ pitəɬ~ɮaɾan no~u tajwan i **** miħəʦaan i, "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u kinapinapina piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, nai saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, itira i ħo~u~uaxiʦiə no~u taipisi mipaʡo~urip to~u tasaɾamaan fafaħijan pirarakat, miɾijaŋ to~u piʡo~utʡo~ut to~u taɬ~ɮəm no~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u sifo~u no~u nanto~u, tərəkən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ko~uwaŋ: mipaʡo~urip to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi taŋ jiŋsħən, mo~uʡəʦəɾa rakat: mipəɾəŋ to~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ miʦikəro~uħ patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u sanaj a o~unto~u, i **** miħəʦa o~u katapiʡəɾaɾan no~u jinʦo~u~umin a o~unto~u ko~uja miħəʦaan itija. awaajko~u sapipatirəŋan to~u fiw no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, maŋaɾəf o~u pipatirəŋ to~u fiw ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, parətatəŋa ko~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, saħəto~u nai manʦin a ni ɾəŋatan, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ano~u əʦa ko~umintaŋ to~u, saħəto~u o~u misamaŋaħaj pisaŋaʡ no~u miko~uwanaj a kawasan kimaɬ~ɮ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ʦaŋra to~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i sifanaʡ to~u "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ", mimaŋaħan a ɬ~ɮəmak a sifanaʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u masaʦaɾajaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɾijaŋ to~u kawasan kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf, ħaɾo~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (kaso~ufo~uʦan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ), to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i kaʡajaw no~u siataw no~u ʦiaji ʦiɾamaɾaj mipapəɾo~u ato~u mirarakat, mitəɾəŋ ʦaŋra to~u "maanən aʦa, wo~u~ufo~uŋ, ʦaajko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kiso~u", "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" sanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ miɾijaŋ, pasajra mitəko~uɾɾ to~u fitao~uɾ i fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk tajra i ʦiaji siənʦənfo~u pafəɾi to~u saɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, o~u kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin miʦajat to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ "o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u ʦaaj ko~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ" sanaj, nai tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ro~umakat pasi kiwiko~upo~u, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u piɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi mao~u *ao~uwən ʦitiɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ħo~uŋ no~u kaəmaŋaj to~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. parətatəŋa ko~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u pipaɾakawas ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan, ʦaaj ko~u mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ. nikawrira o~uni miɾijaŋaj paɾakawasaj kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a o~unto~u, iko~ur no~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦa i, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ko~umitaŋ ʦaaj pikiħar to~u piɾijaŋ no~u sakapo~ut no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kiwiko~upo~u awaaj ko~u təmitəmik. ɾin *ħəfo~u~u ħakasi a piko~unɾiŋan o~u~urm, nawħani ano~u tajra miraajaj i ʦanaɬ~ɮa ko~u pinanam maɾao~um ko~u pajso~u. o~una tajraaj to~u i amiɾika, ʦanaɬ~ɮa, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ itija, miɾajap to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ o~u~urm ʦəʦajaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a piko~unɾiŋ. paħərək minanam mino~ukaj tajni tajwan ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ i, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan to~u no~u o~u~urm i tajwan saka, pasifanaʡ to~u ʦaaj ko~u nifo~uɾawan ko~u piɾijaŋ sanaj a sifanaʡ. pitipo~usan no~u **** miħəʦaan itija, itini to~u i tajwan ko~u pinanaman, itini tajnan ko~uo~u~upəi kiwkaj saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ pinanam to~u o~u~urm, saħato~u o~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u mikiħatijaaj itija, ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan, saiko~uraj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja saʡo~upo~u, masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ ʦaŋra to~u pakajniaj "kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ", o~uja minanamaj parətatəŋa "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ" a wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u maŋaħaj kawasan saan, mitəɾək sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u sakatariʡaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pəɾəŋaw ita ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ i kaʡajaw siataw no~u ʦinamaɾaj i ʦiaji sato~u, maɾo~u "paħərəkan no~u pinanam" to~unini ɾijaɬ~ɮ saan ʦaŋra. saiko~uraj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u **** miħəʦa itija, o~u pipaikr no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u ħatiniaj ɾafin to~u piɾo~ukəs pisamsam a ɾisin ko~uni. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, "sakapo~ut miɾəfəkaj to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a jinʦo~u~umin, ħaɾo~u ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, masao~u nikar ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan, aʦi tiaŋ *o~u~uɾmo~u~utan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi, ripo~u~un, ŋəɬ~ɮrəɾ, ʦħən xio~uŋsħo~u~u aʦi ɬ~ɮrəmɬ~ɮrəmantjao~u~uso~u~uno~u~u* paiwan tamɬ~ɮaw, to~u~uao~u~u jo~u~u*əħai, ɾajsa akjo~u aʦi jo~u~uko~u~uj watan tajaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ɬ~ɮai *ħənjao~u, ɾio~u~u fəŋso~uŋ, *ħan jiħo~u~ua, ʦħən wən*ħi, *əŋ *o~u~unrən, pan *ianər, ħo~u~uaŋ ɾiŋna ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itija. o~unini a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ko~u misaʡo~usiaj to~u "pipəɾəŋ mitaro~uħ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a rato~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋ nipaŋaŋanan no~u jinʦo~u~umin a piħapiw. ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piħapiw matiniaj: "*. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nano~u niɾo~uno~ukan no~u finawɾan a jinʦo~u~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasakapo~ut ato~u finawɾan o~u paɾaħəʦi to~u naifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u paɬ~ɮama to~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u jinʦo~u~umin a saʦo~ukər, miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kami to~unini. *. ʦaaj ko~u "saʡo~upo~u" a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uni, o~u pipəɾəŋ to~u miɾo~ukəsaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin a kawasan ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj pirakarak no~u nijam ko~uni, o~u sapitaɬ~ɮo~uaw mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan a nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaijisi sifo~u i patəfaɬ~ɮaj a səʦəħo~u~uj. *. o~uja miso~uɾap mitənaʡaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, patəkəɬ~ɮ to~u sjakaj ato~u sarikəʦ kami. *. iko~ur no~u səʦəħo~u~uj a misafaʡəɾo~uħ to~u ro~uma a fo~uɬ~ɮawan, maŋaɾaj kami mikiɾim to~u pajso~u ano~u əʦa matajaɾaj to~unini. mato~u maŋaʡaj mapatirəŋ ko~u "piħaratəŋan pitiw no~u ***", o~u nipafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u finawɾan no~u tawan ko~u nian." "sakapo~ut miɾəfəkaj to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a jinʦo~u~umin, mipataɾa to~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u marar a ro~usaro~us, marar a kaɬ~ɮaŋ, waja to~uaso~u, to~usaaj paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ*, misiʡajaw ħaʦa to~u iməŋ mipaɾo~u to~u sakapo~ut, mikaɾiʦ i fafaəɬ~ɮ, pakafit to~u waja a to~uaso~u i tatirəŋan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u jisan sinkako~ujin ʦi kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi itija, kiraro~umo~ut ħan to~u no~u iməŋ i sasəra itija, maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ miɾafin i isiŋan ʦaŋra. nai pipəɾəŋan to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a pisaħaɾaka taŋasa təkəɬ~ɮ a piɬ~ɮəmak, o~u mo~uʡətəpaj aʦa ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan. saka ɾaħəʦi sa i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ʦəʦaj ko~u to~uki itija, no~u kikian saka po~uɾin no~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, maħaənaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~u pisaʦako~uʦako~uɬ~ɮ ni ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ miʦaɾaʡ to~u "ħaɾiɾo~uja, ħaɾiɾo~uja." sanaj, o~uja sakapo~ut aɾa takətakəʦ sato~u maɾipaħak mapo~uɾo~uŋ. kaɾəkapo~ut mitaro~uħ ko~u kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, maso~uŋiɾaʡ mapəɾəŋ ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ kaʡajaw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i siataw no~u ʦiaji, ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ɬ~ɮəmakən ko~uni, o~uja saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ a o~u~urm sakapo~ut niɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u kaɾaħəʦi, o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj tajaɾ no~u o~u~urm ħan aʦa. marəpət no~u iməŋ ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj ʦa ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, *əŋ *o~u~unrən aʦi pan *ianər, maro~ufo~u to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj, iko~ur aɾa ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ pajso~u ko~u sapipasaɬ~ɮak ʦaŋraan, o~uja pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u pajso~u o~u isiŋ no~u mata a tajnansi ʦi *ħəŋ sħəŋħo~u~ui ko~u tajra sanaj i piro~ufo~uan i ʦaiji pasaɬ~ɮak to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paki ɾikisiaj ato~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a pisətək ko~uni, o~uja miɾiʦɾiʦaj o~u nano~u piŋko~usi no~u miɾitaw ʦi ɾin *iŋaŋ fiŋko~usi itija, nawħani matiniaj kaɾaɾitəmo~uħ, mapamo~uʡəʦəɾ aʦa ko~u nia fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ. iko~ur to~u no~u to~usa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, kinaʦəʦaj ni ɾin *iŋaŋ miɾiʦɾiʦ misətək to~uja tato~uɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw a paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u raraw, o~uja mikinsaaj ʦaaj to~u paʦakat to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, nano~ujaan sa maɾaħəʦi itija. iko~ur no~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mipaʦaʡo~uf to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ itija: nai **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj (niʦənpo~u) o~uja wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ faɾiʦən paɾa aɾisansiaŋ; * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ, ko~uɾi nikawitaj paɾasawaɬ~ɮən nai pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u pakajniaj kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ i ħo~uŋ, saka o~uja "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ" sanaj a kawasan nano~ujaan sato~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮ, mapatijo~uɾ to~u ko~u katariʡaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin. jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wijinħo~u~uj nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misətək miħapiw o~u nao~u "tsao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan" mafaɾiʦ paɾa "ʦo~u*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan" sato~u. piʦaɾiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nai ɾisə to~uʡək. ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj no~u timo~uɾ niɾiʦajan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, miɾiʦajaj ʦi *ħəŋ pəiwən, **** tajnan sisifo~u po~unkaʦi mirinaʡaj. mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar.
S.FORM: == Pahakelong han i likisi ko kawasan ni Wufong == Pipalasawad to fodawan faco ni Wufong Pitedalan no Taywan i 1987 mihecaan i, "Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof" palowad to kinapinapina piliyang a demak, nai saka 1 folad, itira i Huaxicie no Taipisi mipa'orip to tasalamaan fafahiyan pirarakat, miliyang to pi'ot'ot to tadem no Bunun ko sifo no Nanto, tereken ko tamdaw i kowang: mipa'orip to kapah no Cozoku finacadan ci Tang Yingshen, mo'ecela rakat: mipeleng to kawasan ni Wufong micikeroh patikoen ko sera ako sanay a onto, i 1987 miheca o katapi'elalan no yincumin a onto koya mihecaan itiya. Awaayko sapipatirengan to fiw no Cozoku a tamdaw, mangalef o pipatireng to fiw ni Wufong, paretatenga ko yincumin to kimad ni Wufong, saheto nai Mancin a ni lengatan, talacowa o Dipong to ano eca Komintang to, saheto o misamangahay pisanga' no mikowanay a kawasan kimad, milongoc cangra to pipalasawad to tilid i sifana' to "mikinafalahay to tireng a tamdaw ci Wufong", mimangahan a demak a sifana' a tilid. Palowad to masacalayay dadoedo miliyang to kawasan kimad ni Wufong ko Taywan yincuminco salongoc yofayof, halo 1987 miheca 9 folad 9 romi'ad (kasofocan ni Wufong), toya romi'ad itira i ka'ayaw no siataw no Ciayi cilamalay mipapelo ato mirarakat, miteleng cangra to "maanen aca, Wufong, caayko tadamaanay kiso", "Pidemak to fodawan faco ni Wufong" sanay a tilid miliyang, pasayra mitekoll to fitaol i fodawan ni Wufong, herek no lahok tayra i Ciayi siencenfo pafeli to saliyang a tilid. 1987 miheca 9 folad 12 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, o kapah no yincumin micayat to tilid "O niyaro' no Cozoko caay ko ni Wufong a niyaro'" sanay, nai Taywan daykako romakat pasi kiwikopo, patorod to piliyang a tilid ci Mao Gaowen citidongay, milongoc palasawad to tilid i hong no kaemangay to kawasan ni Wufong salongoc. Paretatenga ko yincumin to pipalakawas ci Wufongan, caay ko mikinafalahay to tireng tadamaanay tamdaw ci Wufong. Nikawrira oni miliyangay palakawasay kimad ni Wufong a onto, ikor no cecay miheca i, citodongay a Komitang caay pikihar to piliyang no sakapot no yincumin, o citodongay kiwikopo awaay ko temitemik. Lin Zhefu hakasi a pikonlingan URM, nawhani ano tayra miraayay i Canada ko pinanam malaom ko payso. Ona tayraay to i Amilika, Canada, Dipong ci Lin Zongzheng itiya, milayap to saka 4 liyad URM cecayay folad a pikonling. Paherek minanam minokay tayni Taywan ci Lin Zongzheng i, malakakeridan to no URM i Taywan saka, pasifana' to caay ko nifolawan ko piliyang sanay a sifana'. Pitiposan no 1988 mihecaan itiya, itini to i Taywan ko pinanaman, itini Taynan Koupei kiwkay saka 9 lekad pinanam to URM, sahato o yincumin ko mikihatiyaay itiya, ci Lin Zongzheng ko citodongay kakeridan, saikoray romi'ad to dadaya sa'opo, masasowasowal cangra to pakayniay "kawasan ni Wufong", oya minanamay paretatenga "mikinafalahay to tireng" a Wufong o mangahay kawasan saan, mitelek sapidipotaw to sakatari'ang no yincumin, pelengaw ita ko fodawan faco ni Wufong i ka'ayaw siataw no cinamalay i Ciayi sato, malo "paherekan no pinanam" tonini liyad saan cangra. Saikoray romi'ad no 1988 miheca itiya, o pipaikr no yincumin to hatiniay lafin to pilokes pisamsam a lisin koni. I 12 folad 31 romi'ad 'ayaw no lahok, "sakapot milefekay to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a yincumin, halo ci Pasuya Tiakiana Cozoku tamdaw, Masao Nikar 'Amis a tamdaw, Kavas Takistaulan, aci Tiang Qulmutan, Bunun tamdaw, Danav Pakikeli, Ripun, Ngedrel, Chen Xiongshu aci DremdremanTjausunug Paiwan tamdaw, Tuau Yugehai, Laysa Akyo aci Yukuy Watan Tayal tamdaw, Lin Zongzheng, Huang Zhaokai, Dai Zhenyao, Liu Fengsong, Zhan Yihua, Chen Wenzhi, Zeng Junren, Pan Jianer, Huang Lingna 30 ko tamdaw itiya. Onini a lalowadan ci Lin Zongzheng ko misa'osiay to "pipeleng mitaroh to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a ratoh no demak, saka o kapolong nipanganganan no yincumin a pihapiw. Lalowadan a demak no pihapiw matiniay: "1. Onini a demak o nano nilonokan no finawlan a yincumin, polong no kasakapot ato finawlan o palaheci to naifaloco'an no yincumin, o padama to sapilaheciaw a demak no yincumin a sacoker, miahowid kami tonini. 2. Caay ko "sa'opo" a todong koni, o pipeleng to milokesay to yincumin a kawasan demak, caay pirakarak no niyam koni, o sapitadoaw mitefad to fodawan a nipatorodan no Caiyisi sifo i patefaday a Secehuy. 3. Oya misolap mitena'ay a citodongay, pateked to syakay ato sarikec kami. 4. Ikor no Secehuy a misafa'eloh to roma a fodawan, mangalay kami mikilim to payso ano eca matayalay tonini. Mato manga'ay mapatireng ko "piharatengan pitiw no 228", o nipafaloco'an no finawlan no Tawan ko nian." "Sakapot milefekay to fodawan faco ni Wufong" a yincumin, mipatala to sakadademak to marar a rosaros, marar a kadang, waya toaso, tosaay paliding…, misi'ayaw haca to imeng mipalo to sakapot, mikalic i fafaed, pakafit to waya a toaso i tatirengan ni Wufong ko mitiliday no Yisan sinkakoyin ci Kavas Takistaulan aci Danav Pakikeli itiya, kiraromot han to no imeng i sasera itiya, madoka' milafin i isingan cangra. Nai pipelengan to fodawan faco ni Wufong a pisahalaka tangasa teked a pidemak, o mo'etepay aca ko romi'adan. Saka laheci sa i herek no lahok to cecay ko toki itiya, no kikian saka polin no fodawan faco ni Wufong, mahaenay a demakan, o pisacakocakod ni Lin Zongzheng micala' to "Haliloya, Haliloya." Sanay, oya sakapot ala taketakec sato malipahak mapolong. Kalekapot mitaroh ko kapah no yincumin, masongila' mapeleng koya fodawan faco ni Wufong ka'ayaw no cilamalay i siataw no Ciayi, caay ko rahodayay demaken koni, oya saka 9 liyad a URM sakapot nidemakan ko kalaheci, oya tadamaanay tayal no URM han aca. Marepet no imeng ko tatoloay ca Lin Zongzheng, Zeng Junren aci Pan Jianer, marofo to cecay lipay, ikor ala 10 'ofad payso ko sapipasadak cangraan, oya pasadakay to payso o ising no mata a Taynansi ci Zheng Shenghui ko tayra sanay i pirofoan i Caiyi pasadak to tamdaw. O paki likisiay ato sini'adaay a pisetek koni, oya miliclicay o nano pingkosi no Militaw ci Lin Qingang fingkosi itiya, nawhani matiniay kalalitemoh, mapamo'ecel aca ko nia fodawan faco ni Wufong. Ikor to no tosa folad, kinacecay ni Lin Qingang miliclic misetek toya tatoloay tamdaw a palasawad to raraw, oya mikinsaay caay to pacakat tonini a demak, nanoyaan sa malaheci itiya. Ikor no pipalasawad to fodawan faco ni Wufong, mipaca'of to ko Komintang itiya: nai 1989 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad, laloma'an citodongay (Nicenpo) oya Wufongsiang falicen pala Alisansiang; 9 folad 12 roi'ad, Koli nikawitay palasawaden nai pitilidan ko pakayniay kimad ni Wufong i hong, saka oya "mikinafalahay to tireng" sanay a kawasan nanoyaan sato malasawad, mapatiyol to ko katari'ang no yincumin. Yincuminco wiyinhuy nai 1998 miheca 11 folad 6 romi'ad, misetek mihapiw o nao "Tsao finacadan" mafalic pala "Cozo finacadan" sato. Picaliwan a tilid, nai Lise to'ek. Cifaloco'ay no timol nilicayan ci Huang Zhaokai, milicayay ci Zheng Peiwen, 2018 Taynan sisifo ponkaci mirina'ay. Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar.
S.PHON: == paħakəɾo~uŋ ħan i ɾikisi ko~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ == pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ pitəɬ~ɮaɾan no~u tajwan i **** miħəʦaan i, "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u kinapinapina piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, nai saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, itira i ħo~u~uaxiʦiə no~u taipisi mipaʡo~urip to~u tasaɾamaan fafaħijan pirarakat, miɾijaŋ to~u piʡo~utʡo~ut to~u taɬ~ɮəm no~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ko~u sifo~u no~u nanto~u, tərəkən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ko~uwaŋ: mipaʡo~urip to~u kapaħ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi taŋ jiŋsħən, mo~uʡəʦəɾa rakat: mipəɾəŋ to~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ miʦikəro~uħ patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u sanaj a o~unto~u, i **** miħəʦa o~u katapiʡəɾaɾan no~u jinʦo~u~umin a o~unto~u ko~uja miħəʦaan itija. awaajko~u sapipatirəŋan to~u fiw no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, maŋaɾəf o~u pipatirəŋ to~u fiw ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, parətatəŋa ko~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, saħəto~u nai manʦin a ni ɾəŋatan, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ano~u əʦa ko~umintaŋ to~u, saħəto~u o~u misamaŋaħaj pisaŋaʡ no~u miko~uwanaj a kawasan kimaɬ~ɮ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ ʦaŋra to~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i sifanaʡ to~u "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ", mimaŋaħan a ɬ~ɮəmak a sifanaʡ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u masaʦaɾajaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u miɾijaŋ to~u kawasan kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf, ħaɾo~u **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (kaso~ufo~uʦan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ), to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ itira i kaʡajaw no~u siataw no~u ʦiaji ʦiɾamaɾaj mipapəɾo~u ato~u mirarakat, mitəɾəŋ ʦaŋra to~u "maanən aʦa, wo~u~ufo~uŋ, ʦaajko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kiso~u", "piɬ~ɮəmak to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" sanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ miɾijaŋ, pasajra mitəko~uɾɾ to~u fitao~uɾ i fo~uɬ~ɮawan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk tajra i ʦiaji siənʦənfo~u pafəɾi to~u saɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, o~u kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin miʦajat to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ "o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʦo~u*o~uko~u ʦaaj ko~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ" sanaj, nai tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ro~umakat pasi kiwiko~upo~u, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u piɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi mao~u *ao~uwən ʦitiɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ħo~uŋ no~u kaəmaŋaj to~u kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. parətatəŋa ko~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u pipaɾakawas ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋan, ʦaaj ko~u mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi wo~u~ufo~uŋ. nikawrira o~uni miɾijaŋaj paɾakawasaj kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a o~unto~u, iko~ur no~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦa i, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ko~umitaŋ ʦaaj pikiħar to~u piɾijaŋ no~u sakapo~ut no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kiwiko~upo~u awaaj ko~u təmitəmik. ɾin *ħəfo~u~u ħakasi a piko~unɾiŋan o~u~urm, nawħani ano~u tajra miraajaj i ʦanaɬ~ɮa ko~u pinanam maɾao~um ko~u pajso~u. o~una tajraaj to~u i amiɾika, ʦanaɬ~ɮa, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ itija, miɾajap to~u saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ o~u~urm ʦəʦajaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a piko~unɾiŋ. paħərək minanam mino~ukaj tajni tajwan ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ i, maɾakakəriɬ~ɮan to~u no~u o~u~urm i tajwan saka, pasifanaʡ to~u ʦaaj ko~u nifo~uɾawan ko~u piɾijaŋ sanaj a sifanaʡ. pitipo~usan no~u **** miħəʦaan itija, itini to~u i tajwan ko~u pinanaman, itini tajnan ko~uo~u~upəi kiwkaj saka * ɾəkaɬ~ɮ pinanam to~u o~u~urm, saħato~u o~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u mikiħatijaaj itija, ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan, saiko~uraj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja saʡo~upo~u, masaso~uwaso~uwaɾ ʦaŋra to~u pakajniaj "kawasan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ", o~uja minanamaj parətatəŋa "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ" a wo~u~ufo~uŋ o~u maŋaħaj kawasan saan, mitəɾək sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u sakatariʡaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pəɾəŋaw ita ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ i kaʡajaw siataw no~u ʦinamaɾaj i ʦiaji sato~u, maɾo~u "paħərəkan no~u pinanam" to~unini ɾijaɬ~ɮ saan ʦaŋra. saiko~uraj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u **** miħəʦa itija, o~u pipaikr no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u ħatiniaj ɾafin to~u piɾo~ukəs pisamsam a ɾisin ko~uni. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, "sakapo~ut miɾəfəkaj to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a jinʦo~u~umin, ħaɾo~u ʦi paso~u~uja tiakiana ʦo~u*o~uko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, masao~u nikar ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan, aʦi tiaŋ *o~u~uɾmo~u~utan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi, ripo~u~un, ŋəɬ~ɮrəɾ, ʦħən xio~uŋsħo~u~u aʦi ɬ~ɮrəmɬ~ɮrəmantjao~u~uso~u~uno~u~u* paiwan tamɬ~ɮaw, to~u~uao~u~u jo~u~u*əħai, ɾajsa akjo~u aʦi jo~u~uko~u~uj watan tajaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, ɬ~ɮai *ħənjao~u, ɾio~u~u fəŋso~uŋ, *ħan jiħo~u~ua, ʦħən wən*ħi, *əŋ *o~u~unrən, pan *ianər, ħo~u~uaŋ ɾiŋna ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw itija. o~unini a ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ ko~u misaʡo~usiaj to~u "pipəɾəŋ mitaro~uħ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a rato~uħ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋ nipaŋaŋanan no~u jinʦo~u~umin a piħapiw. ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u piħapiw matiniaj: "*. o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nano~u niɾo~uno~ukan no~u finawɾan a jinʦo~u~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasakapo~ut ato~u finawɾan o~u paɾaħəʦi to~u naifaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u paɬ~ɮama to~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u jinʦo~u~umin a saʦo~ukər, miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kami to~unini. *. ʦaaj ko~u "saʡo~upo~u" a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uni, o~u pipəɾəŋ to~u miɾo~ukəsaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin a kawasan ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj pirakarak no~u nijam ko~uni, o~u sapitaɬ~ɮo~uaw mitəfaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan a nipato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦaijisi sifo~u i patəfaɬ~ɮaj a səʦəħo~u~uj. *. o~uja miso~uɾap mitənaʡaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, patəkəɬ~ɮ to~u sjakaj ato~u sarikəʦ kami. *. iko~ur no~u səʦəħo~u~uj a misafaʡəɾo~uħ to~u ro~uma a fo~uɬ~ɮawan, maŋaɾaj kami mikiɾim to~u pajso~u ano~u əʦa matajaɾaj to~unini. mato~u maŋaʡaj mapatirəŋ ko~u "piħaratəŋan pitiw no~u ***", o~u nipafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u finawɾan no~u tawan ko~u nian." "sakapo~ut miɾəfəkaj to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ" a jinʦo~u~umin, mipataɾa to~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u marar a ro~usaro~us, marar a kaɬ~ɮaŋ, waja to~uaso~u, to~usaaj paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ*, misiʡajaw ħaʦa to~u iməŋ mipaɾo~u to~u sakapo~ut, mikaɾiʦ i fafaəɬ~ɮ, pakafit to~u waja a to~uaso~u i tatirəŋan ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u jisan sinkako~ujin ʦi kab~vas takistao~u~uɾan aʦi ɬ~ɮanab~v pakikəɾi itija, kiraro~umo~ut ħan to~u no~u iməŋ i sasəra itija, maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ miɾafin i isiŋan ʦaŋra. nai pipəɾəŋan to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ a pisaħaɾaka taŋasa təkəɬ~ɮ a piɬ~ɮəmak, o~u mo~uʡətəpaj aʦa ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan. saka ɾaħəʦi sa i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ʦəʦaj ko~u to~uki itija, no~u kikian saka po~uɾin no~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, maħaənaj a ɬ~ɮəmakan, o~u pisaʦako~uʦako~uɬ~ɮ ni ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ miʦaɾaʡ to~u "ħaɾiɾo~uja, ħaɾiɾo~uja." sanaj, o~uja sakapo~ut aɾa takətakəʦ sato~u maɾipaħak mapo~uɾo~uŋ. kaɾəkapo~ut mitaro~uħ ko~u kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, maso~uŋiɾaʡ mapəɾəŋ ko~uja fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ kaʡajaw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i siataw no~u ʦiaji, ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ɬ~ɮəmakən ko~uni, o~uja saka * ɾijaɬ~ɮ a o~u~urm sakapo~ut niɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u kaɾaħəʦi, o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj tajaɾ no~u o~u~urm ħan aʦa. marəpət no~u iməŋ ko~u tato~uɾo~uaj ʦa ɾin *o~uŋ*ħəŋ, *əŋ *o~u~unrən aʦi pan *ianər, maro~ufo~u to~u ʦəʦaj ɾipaj, iko~ur aɾa ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ pajso~u ko~u sapipasaɬ~ɮak ʦaŋraan, o~uja pasaɬ~ɮakaj to~u pajso~u o~u isiŋ no~u mata a tajnansi ʦi *ħəŋ sħəŋħo~u~ui ko~u tajra sanaj i piro~ufo~uan i ʦaiji pasaɬ~ɮak to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paki ɾikisiaj ato~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a pisətək ko~uni, o~uja miɾiʦɾiʦaj o~u nano~u piŋko~usi no~u miɾitaw ʦi ɾin *iŋaŋ fiŋko~usi itija, nawħani matiniaj kaɾaɾitəmo~uħ, mapamo~uʡəʦəɾ aʦa ko~u nia fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ. iko~ur to~u no~u to~usa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, kinaʦəʦaj ni ɾin *iŋaŋ miɾiʦɾiʦ misətək to~uja tato~uɾo~uaj tamɬ~ɮaw a paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u raraw, o~uja mikinsaaj ʦaaj to~u paʦakat to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, nano~ujaan sa maɾaħəʦi itija. iko~ur no~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan faʦo~u ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ, mipaʦaʡo~uf to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ itija: nai **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾaɾo~umaʡan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj (niʦənpo~u) o~uja wo~u~ufo~uŋsiaŋ faɾiʦən paɾa aɾisansiaŋ; * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ, ko~uɾi nikawitaj paɾasawaɬ~ɮən nai pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~u pakajniaj kimaɬ~ɮ ni wo~u~ufo~uŋ i ħo~uŋ, saka o~uja "mikinafaɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ" sanaj a kawasan nano~ujaan sato~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮ, mapatijo~uɾ to~u ko~u katariʡaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin. jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u wijinħo~u~uj nai **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misətək miħapiw o~u nao~u "tsao~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan" mafaɾiʦ paɾa "ʦo~u*o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan" sato~u. piʦaɾiwan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, nai ɾisə to~uʡək. ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj no~u timo~uɾ niɾiʦajan ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ *ħao~ukai, miɾiʦajaj ʦi *ħəŋ pəiwən, **** tajnan sisifo~u po~unkaʦi mirinaʡaj. mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar.
